chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett.No.D-918 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3922/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, i.e., 04.07.2023. Learned AAG, while placing on record the case of Ali Hassan and 20 others vs. The P.O. of Sindh through Secretary Home Department, Sindh Secretariat, Karachi and 3 others (2024 PLC (C.S) 396), submits that petitions of similar nature have already been dismissed by this Court on merits. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner today as well, it appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application (s). J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
